title: Mesh Storm
description:
Retromodern hi-speed shmup.

This is a re-release of the classic shoot-'em-up originally created by Kenta Cho (ABA Games). This release is an unofficial maintenance port and is not developed by the original author. 

This version adds:

• Improved gamepad support

• Restart option

• Native Linux build

Keyboard controls:

• Move / Navigate menu: Arrow keys

• Fire: Z

• Special / Change special mode: X

• Pause: ESC / P

Credits:
Game was originally designed and developed by Kenta Cho (ABA Games). All original game design, code, assets, and creative credit belong to Kenta Cho. This re-release only provides compatibility and quality-of-life improvements while preserving the original gameplay experience.
